title: halenia major subsp. major
intro: Halenia major subsp. major, also known as Yellow Gentian, is a perennial plant native to the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and liver problems due to its bitter compounds. The health benefits of Halenia major subsp. major include its ability to stimulate digestion, improve appetite, and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried powder for herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
